title: National ambulance syndromic surveillance: weekly bulletins 2026
body: "The national ambulance syndromic surveillance system (NASSS) monitors daily calls made by people to an ambulance trust. All 10 ambulance trusts in England provide data. We analyse this data daily and publish a weekly report.  Weekly summaries for previous years are also available for:   2025 2024 2023 2022 2021 2020 2019  "
